description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian woman with a realistic human form. She is dressed in a collared, long-sleeve shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the elbows and fitted pants, giving her a casual yet slightly formal appearance suitable for an urban environment. Her arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and she stands barefoot, with her feet flat on the ground. The figure's facial features are defined, and her hair is styled to fall just past her shoulders, tucked behind her ears. The clothing fits closely to the body, accentuating the natural contours and proportions of an adult female. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall surface of the figure is matte with a semi-soft tactile quality.
description: A barefoot adult woman in a collared shirt and fitted pants, arms outstretched, with shoulder-length hair and a casual urban appearance. The figure is detailed and realistic, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woman's facial features, collared shirt, fitted pants, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the natural curve of the back and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with arms extended and hair visible down the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the body and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: collared long-sleeve shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length straight hair tucked behind ears
